comment:
Ограничения: $$\left\{ \begin{array}{l}
(x+1)^2>0\\
x+1 > 0
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow x > -1$$
$$(\log_2(x+1)^2-5)(4\log_2(x+1)-5)-3=0\\ 2\cdot \log_2(x+1)\cdot 4\cdot \log_2(x+1)-5\cdot 2\cdot\log_2(x+1)-20\log_2(x+1)+25-3=0\\ 8\cdot\log_2^2(x+1)-30\log_2(x+1)+22=0\\ 4\log_2^2(x+1)-15\log_2(x+1)+11=0$$
Пусть \(\log_2(x+1)=t\)
$$4t^2-15t+11=0\\ \displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t=1\\ t=\frac{11}{4} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \log_{2}( x+1) =1\\ \log_{2}( x+1) =\frac{11}{4} \end{array} \right.\\ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x+1=2\\ x+1=2^{\frac{11}{4}} \end{array} \right.\\ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=1\\ x=2^{2+\frac{3}{4}} -1 \end{array} \right.\\ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=1\\ x=4\sqrt[4]{8} -1 \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
Ответ: \(x=1\); \(x=4\sqrt[4]{8} -1\)
